changes.motivation: Add configurable pre-commit hooks (tf-fmt, hcl-fmt) to end-user mkDevShell devshells, controlled via Nix params rather than panfactum.yaml, following the same pattern used for this repo's own lint hooks.
changes.summary: Created packages/devshell/precommit.nix: generates .pre-commit-config.yaml using pkgs.formats.yaml with absolute Nix store paths for tofu and terragrunt. Accepts a precommit = { enable, tf_fmt, hcl_fmt } attrset; uses lib.optionals to conditionally include each hook. Empty hooks list produces repos = [].

changes.motivation: Wire precommit.nix into mkDevShell so users can configure pre-commit via a top-level precommit attribute set with enable/tf_fmt/hcl_fmt booleans (all defaulting to true).
changes.summary: Modified flake.nix: mkDevShell accepts a precommit param; conditionally adds pkgs.prek to buildInputs and exports PF_PRECOMMIT_CONFIG env var pointing to the Nix-generated config file only when precommit.enable = true.

changes.motivation: Run prek install at devshell activation to register the generated pre-commit config.
changes.summary: Modified packages/devshell/scripts/enter-shell-local.sh: added a block that copies PF_PRECOMMIT_CONFIG to .pre-commit-config.yaml and runs prek install, guarded by [ -n "$PF_PRECOMMIT_CONFIG" ].

changes.motivation: Keep prek out of the devshell environment when pre-commit is disabled to avoid polluting PATH unnecessarily.
changes.summary: Removed prek from packages/devshell/default.nix and moved it to a conditional lib.optionals in flake.nix mkDevShell, so it is only included when precommit.enable = true.

changes.motivation: Fix a TypeScript type error introduced when the config values type was broadened to include booleans alongside strings.
changes.summary: Changed packages/cli/src/util/devshell/upsertDevshellConfig.ts to use Object.assign(context.devshellConfig, values) instead of an indexed assignment cast with as any, making the assignment type-safe.

changes.motivation: Ensure .pre-commit-config.yaml is added to .gitignore for end-user repos that activate the devshell.
changes.summary: Added .pre-commit-config.yaml to EXPECTED_GITIGNORE_CONTENTS.root in packages/cli/src/util/devshell/constants.ts so the devshell sync command enforces it.

problems: The initial implementation used a hybrid Nix-generated + runtime yq-filtering approach to handle panfactum.yaml config flags. This was unnecessary complexity: because the panfactum.yaml Nix-can't-read constraint only applies to flake evaluation, and the correct solution is to pass flags as mkDevShell params (Nix attrset), the yq approach should have been rejected upfront. The agent only pivoted after user feedback, wasting effort on schema changes that had to be reverted.

The devshell TOC.md or default.nix had no comment or documentation indicating that packages like prek should NOT be added to devshell/default.nix directly but instead conditionally included in mkDevShell per feature — this had to be discovered by reading the code and corrected after user feedback.

packages/cli/src/util/devshell/upsertDevshellConfig.ts had an implicit assumption that all config values were strings, but the new boolean fields required broadening the value type. The lack of a union type or a comment explaining the constraint caused the agent to initially write an unsafe `as any` cast that the linter rejected.
